primary_snippet.content:
import { ChevronRightIcon } from 'lucide-react'
import Link from 'next/link'
import React, { ReactNode } from 'react'
import { Badge, cn } from 'ui'

interface Props {
  url: string
  announcement: string | ReactNode
  /* Text or node to display on mobile */
  announcementMobile?: string | ReactNode
  badge?: string | ReactNode
  target?: '_self' | '_blank' | string
  className?: string
  hasArrow?: boolean
  style?: React.CSSProperties
}

const AnnouncementBadge = ({
  url,
  announcement,
  announcementMobile,
  badge,
  target = '_self',
  className,
  hasArrow = true,
  style,
}: Props) => (
  <div className={cn('relative w-fit max-w-xl flex justify-center', className)} style={style}>
    <Link
      href={url}
      target={target}
      className={cn(
        `
          announcement-link
          text-nowrap
          group/announcement
          relative
          flex flex-row
          items-center
          p-1 pr-0.5
          text-sm
          w-auto
          gap-1.5
          text-left
          rounded-full
          bg-opacity-20
          border
          border-background-surface-300
